parsed_output.justification: Tyler and Clint provide contradictory claims regarding the Insomniac role: Tyler claims he was the Robber and robbed Clint's Insomniac card, while Clint claims he remained the Insomniac. Additionally, Tyler and Clint coordinate their efforts to accuse Erin of being the Werewolf, with Tyler initiating these accusations immediately at the start of the discussion. This combination of a direct contradiction and coordinated targeting of another player strongly suggests that Tyler and Clint are the Werewolf team.
